top_signals.title: Emerging Assets Stage Rebound as Sharp Losses Lure Dip Buyers
top_signals.summary: Emerging-market assets rallied on Tuesday, with investors buying the dip in shares of Asian companies tied to the artificial intelligence theme and currencies rebounding after Iran and Israel paused hostilities.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil market defies predictions of summer supply crunch
top_signals.summary: Crude prices stay below $100 a barrel as China’s import cuts help eke out global stockpiles
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: PwC investigated by accounting regulator over WHSmith audit
top_signals.summary: FRC to probe Big Four firm’s work after UK travel retailer revealed accounting errors in US business
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: So long Tate & Lyle, stock market trivia titan
Al-Designed CTV Saves 100,000 Liters of Fuel, 258 Tons of CO2 a Year
top_signals.summary: Compute Maritime, the deep tech company behind NeuralShipper, the world's first Al platform for ship design, has revealed the results of its UK Government-funded project, GenDSOM, to bring generative Al and additive manufacturing into ship design.Working…

top_signals.title: New Apple feature automatically changes your compromised passwords
top_signals.summary: At WWDC 26, Apple announced an Apple Intelligence-powered feature that can automatically fix weak and compromised passwords. This works in Safari, and it's rolling out with iOS 27. [...]
